trainers.name: Morgan
trainers.roster: Latias-1, Cobalion-2, Terrakion-3, Virizion-3
trainers.species: Latias, Cobalion, Terrakion, Virizion
trainers.quote: If you’re free for a time, come on by. ♪ If you’re bored for a while, stop on in. ♪ Battle till you burst, oh, won’t you try? ♪ For a good battle, the Battle Maison’s just fine. ♪ You’re a good ’un, guest. It’s a pleasure to me that you keep coming to see us. My name is Morgan. Of the four Battle Chatelaine sisters, I’m the eldest. I’ve been counting the days till I might face you again. Let’s get started with the battle at once, and mind yourself that you don’t lose! I tell you, I may not be a tip-top Trainer... But I’ll put everything into treating you to the most smashing battle you’ve ever had!

trainers.name: Dana
trainers.roster: Moltres-1, Registeel-2, Articuno-3, Zapdos-3, Regirock-3, Regice-4
trainers.species: Moltres, Registeel, Articuno, Zapdos, Regirock, Regice
trainers.quote: Aye, in fairness, I knew a cracking Trainer like yourself would make it! So let’s get straight to the battle! Both me and my Pokémon are delighted and excited about facing you again. Sure, and I don’t need to be telling you, but... It’ll be bad for me if that sister o’ mine hears that I battled you without keeping up my wee act... So get your Pokémon out and let the battle begin! Here I come, ready or not!

trainers.name: Evelyn
trainers.roster: Latios-1, Raikou-3, Entei-4, Suicune-4
trainers.species: Latios, Raikou, Entei, Suicune
trainers.quote: Uh-um... Do...do you remember me? You don’t...do you... Of course... I-I’m Evelyn... U-um... You really are a strong Trainer, aren’t you, dear guest? Ah... I don’t want to fight... You look too scary... I want to go home... O-oh! I’m so sorry!!! I know how fed up my sister would be if she heard me saying such things! L-let’s just have the battle, shall we? I’ll do my best! Honestly, I really will! You can fight with all you’ve got!

trainers.name: Nita
trainers.roster: Tornadus-2, Landorus-2, Thundurus-3
trainers.species: Tornadus, Landorus, Thundurus
trainers.quote: Hi, how are you? I’m Nita! It’s been a long time, Trainer! You haven’t forgotten me, right? I might go mental if you say you did, with how I’ve been waiting! I know you’re the only Trainer worth the challenge, and no guff! So let’s get cracking on it!
